results.name: valla
results.description: A plane that was formerly a part of Kaldheim until an event caused it to be separated from the World Tree.

results.name: valley of the spirit dragon
results.description: A valley on Tarkir that served as Ugin's tomb for a time, identified in some art by the twisted rock spire beside it.

results.name: vambrace
results.description: Armor strapped to the forearm for protection

results.name: vampire bite
results.description: Art of vampires biting, or the two dot bite mark vampire fangs leave behind

results.name: vanilla aura
results.description: Auras that only change power and toughness.

results.name: vanilla equipment
results.description: Equipment that only changes power and toughness.

results.name: vanity card
results.description: Cards named after specific people or real things

results.name: vantress symbol
results.description: A keyhole, the symbol of the blue faction of Vantress on Eldraine.

results.name: vault boy
results.description: The mascot of Vault-tec, from the Fallout franchise

results.name: venger
results.description: Villain from the Dungeons and Dragons cartoon series

results.name: venus (tmnt)
results.description: A mutant frog who was experimented on and turned into a turtle. Later became a full turtle (But that's not depicted in her one card).
